{{Infobox group
| name = Corporate Subline
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Corporate Subline]] issues reports.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c25">''The Captain'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Corporate Subline]] is a way to contact organizations like the [[Vallenar Corporation]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36">''The Captain'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Corporate Subline]] is a destination or route mentioned by the [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38">''The Captain'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Are we close enough to reach the Corporate Subline?” I asked.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
